title.v: khai báo chuyển phép sang năm sau

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin chuyển phép theo bộ phận %s đã được khai báo.' else N'The record by department %s is already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end
select ngay_thang from vhrghphep where ma_bp = @ma_bp and nam_hl = @nam_hl return

if exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_bp = @ma_bp and nam_hl = @nam_hl) begin select 'ma_bp' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_bp)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_bp = $ma_bp.OldValue and nam_hl = $nam_hl.OldValue) begin select 'ma_bp' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if @ma_bp <> $ma_bp.OldValue or @nam_hl <> $nam_hl.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (ma_bp = $ma_bp.OldValue and nam_hl = $nam_hl.OldValue)) and (ma_bp = @ma_bp and nam_hl = @nam_hl)) begin select 'ma_bp' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_bp)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_bp = @ma_bp
var f = this, m = f.getItemValue('thang'), d = f.getItemValue('ngay'), c = (d == 0 ? '' : '' + (d > 9 ? '' : '0') + d + '/' + (m > 9 ? '' : '0') + m); f.setItemValue('ngay_thang', c);
